use_cases: Form submission triggers in SaaS applications
Action buttons in e-commerce checkout flows
Primary and secondary action triggers in admin interfaces
ai_summary: A versatile, production-ready button component built with Radix Slot and class-variance-authority. Features multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes with subtle shadow styling. Includes proper accessibility support with focus-visible outlines and disabled states. Designed for mixed platform use with responsive sizing.
